summary: Iteration 120 - ARS 1000 Analytics, Widget, and Farmer Features Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. All new endpoints working: GET /api/ars1000/recoltes/analytics (returns volume_par_campagne, qualite_par_parcelle, distribution_grades, evolution_mensuelle, top_planteurs), GET /api/ars1000/certification/dashboard (returns total_pdc, pdc_valides, total_kg_recoltes for widget), POST /api/ars1000/certification/reclamation (farmer role can submit), GET /api/ars1000/certification/reclamations/farmer (farmer-specific reclamations), POST /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/protection-env (farmer can add with farmer_id and parcelle_nom), GET /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/protection-env (filters by farmer_id for farmer users). Frontend: All UI components verified - ARS1000Widget on cooperative dashboard showing certification level/conformity/PDC count/kg recoltes, RecoltesAnalytics in Récoltes tab with stats cards and filters, FarmerReclamationsPage with form and list, FarmerProtectionEnvPage with form and stats, Farmer dashboard Plus tab has 'ARS 1000 & Environnement' section with Mon PDC/Mes Reclamations/Protection Env links.
critical_code_review_comments: Analytics endpoint correctly uses MongoDB aggregation pipelines for volume_par_campagne, qualite_par_parcelle, distribution_grades, evolution_mensuelle, top_planteurs
Certification dashboard endpoint now returns total_pdc, pdc_valides, total_kg_recoltes for the ARS1000Widget
Reclamation endpoint correctly allows farmer role (not just cooperative) and sets source='agriculteur' and farmer_id
Protection-env endpoint correctly supports farmer_id and parcelle_nom fields, and filters by farmer_id for farmer users
ARS1000Widget.jsx correctly fetches from /api/ars1000/certification/dashboard and displays niveau, conformite, PDC count, kg recoltes
RecoltesAnalytics component uses recharts for volume_par_campagne (BarChart), distribution_grades (PieChart), evolution_mensuelle (LineChart), qualite_par_parcelle (horizontal BarChart)
FarmerReclamationsPage has proper form with objet, description, priorite fields and displays farmer's reclamations
FarmerProtectionEnvPage has proper form with type_protection, parcelle_nom, description, mesures_prises, distance_cours_eau_m fields and shows conformity status
Farmer dashboard Plus tab correctly shows 'ARS 1000 & Environnement' section with Mon PDC, Mes Reclamations, Protection Env links
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests: TEST_Reclamation_Farmer_Iteration120 (farmer reclamation), TEST_Protection_Iteration120 (cours_eau, conforme), TEST_Protection_NonConforme_Iteration120 (cours_eau, non conforme), TEST_Reforestation_Iteration120 (reforestation type)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ARS 1000 analytics, widget, and farmer features fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/ars1000/recoltes/analytics (returns volume_par_campagne, qualite_par_parcelle, distribution_grades, evolution_mensuelle, top_planteurs), GET /api/ars1000/certification/dashboard (returns total_pdc, pdc_valides, total_kg_recoltes for widget), POST /api/ars1000/certification/reclamation (farmer can submit), GET /api/ars1000/certification/reclamations/farmer (farmer-specific), POST/GET /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/protection-env (farmer can add/view). Frontend: ARS1000Widget on /cooperative/dashboard, RecoltesAnalytics in ARS1000Dashboard Récoltes tab, FarmerReclamationsPage at /farmer/reclamations, FarmerProtectionEnvPage at /farmer/protection-env, Farmer Plus tab has ARS 1000 & Environnement section.

backend_apis: GET /api/ars1000/recoltes/analytics - PASSED: Returns volume_par_campagne, qualite_par_parcelle, distribution_grades, evolution_mensuelle, top_planteurs
GET /api/ars1000/certification/dashboard - PASSED: Returns total_pdc, pdc_valides, total_kg_recoltes for widget
POST /api/ars1000/certification/reclamation (farmer) - PASSED: Farmer can submit reclamation with source='agriculteur'
POST /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/protection-env (farmer) - PASSED: Farmer can add with farmer_id and parcelle_nom
GET /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/protection-env (farmer) - PASSED: Filters by farmer_id for farmer users
Protection-env conforme_distance_eau - PASSED: Distance >= 10m returns conforme=true, < 10m returns conforme=false
Protection-env reforestation type - PASSED: Supports superficie_reboisee_ha and especes_plantees
frontend_ui: ARS1000Widget on /cooperative/dashboard - PASSED: Shows certification level (non_certifie), conformity (82.7%), PDC count (2), PDC validés (0), kg récoltes (0)
ARS1000Dashboard Récoltes tab - PASSED: Stats cards (En attente, Validées, Rejetées, Total kg), filter buttons (Toutes, En attente, Validée, Rejetée)
FarmerReclamationsPage at /farmer/reclamations - PASSED: Form with objet, description, priorite fields, list of farmer's reclamations

FarmerProtectionEnvPage at /farmer/protection-env - PASSED: Stats cards (Cours d'eau, Anti-érosion, Reforestation, Zone à risque), form with type, parcelle, description, mesures_prises, distance_cours_eau_m
Farmer dashboard Plus tab - PASSED: 'ARS 1000 & Environnement' section with Mon PDC, Mes Reclamations, Protection Env links

analytics_endpoint_details.volume_par_campagne: Array of {campagne, total_kg, count, validees} - Volume by campaign
analytics_endpoint_details.qualite_par_parcelle: Array of {parcelle, avg_qualite, count, total_kg} - Quality by parcel
analytics_endpoint_details.distribution_grades: Array of {grade, count, total_kg} - Grade distribution (A/B/C/D)
analytics_endpoint_details.evolution_mensuelle: Array of {mois, total_kg, count, avg_qualite} - Monthly evolution
analytics_endpoint_details.top_planteurs: Array of {nom, total_kg, count, avg_qualite} - Top 10 farmers (coop/admin only)
